nodes.title: Fab 17 Output
nodes.description: Overall semiconductor fabrication output for Fab 17. Aggregates engineering, supply chain, and workforce risk.

nodes.title: Engineering Operations
nodes.description: Lithography and packaging lines. Depends on logistics for material availability.

nodes.title: Lithography Line
nodes.description: Wafer lithography process. Depends on SUMCO silicon yield rates and Alice Chen as process lead.

nodes.title: Alice Chen, Process Lead
nodes.description: Senior process lead for lithography calibration. Single point of failure for yield tuning.

nodes.title: Packaging Line
nodes.description: Chip packaging and testing. Depends on shift supervisor Bob Taylor for smooth operations.

nodes.title: Supply Chain
nodes.description: End-to-end supply chain: wafer procurement, logistics, and buffer inventory.

nodes.title: Wafer Suppliers
nodes.description: Aggregates risk across three wafer sources: TSMC, GlobalFoundries, and SUMCO. Declassifies confidential inputs.

nodes.title: TSMC Wafer Supply
nodes.description: Primary wafer supplier. 300mm wafer supply from Taiwan.

nodes.title: GlobalFoundries Wafer Supply
nodes.description: Secondary wafer supplier. Dresden and Singapore fabs.

nodes.title: SUMCO Silicon
nodes.description: SUMCO raw silicon wafers. Single-source specialty substrate.

nodes.title: SUMCO Yield Rate
nodes.description: SUMCO yield percentage. Below 70 percent flags critical quality risk.

nodes.title: Logistics
nodes.description: Freight and transportation. Taipei and Singapore lanes plus bunker fuel costs.

nodes.title: Taipei Freight
nodes.description: Taipei-Shanghai shipping lane. Heavily exposed to bunker fuel volatility.

nodes.title: Singapore Freight
nodes.description: Singapore-Rotterdam shipping lane. Alternative to Taipei lane.

nodes.title: Bunker Fuel Index
nodes.description: Global bunker fuel price index. Spikes above 50 percent of baseline raise logistics risk.

nodes.title: Buffer Warehouse
nodes.description: Safety stock of critical wafers and substrates. Stock levels below 30 percent are a concern.

nodes.title: Buffer Stock Level
nodes.description: Current buffer stock as percentage of target. Below 30 percent triggers replenishment alert.

nodes.title: Workforce
nodes.description: Fab personnel: shift supervisors and maintenance crews.

nodes.title: Bob Taylor, Shift Supervisor
nodes.description: Night shift supervisor for packaging line. Single point of failure for after-hours operations.

nodes.title: Maintenance Crew
nodes.description: Preventive maintenance crew. Staffing levels below 60 percent risk equipment downtime.
